# CalciPro

CalciPro is a highly optimized, modern all-in-one web calculator directory featuring calculators for Finance, Health, Education, Tech, and Utility workflows.

## Features

- **Calculators**: Highly interactive planning engines with slider controls, instant validation, real-time results, and advanced data visualization charts.
- **Save & Share**: Embed support, SVG image exports, printable reports, and localStorage-based calculation histories.
- **Privacy First**: Calculations are computed client-side in the browser session, respecting user privacy.

## Category Structure

All calculators are mapped under their respective category hubs:

- **Finance**: [Finance Calculators](/calculators/finance) - Simple Interest, Compound Interest, EMI, SIP, Lumpsum, Loan, Inflation, and GST calculators.
- **Health**: [Health Calculators](/calculators/health) - BMI, BMR, Calorie, and Ideal Weight calculators.
- **Education**: [Education Calculators](/calculators/education) - Scientific, Age, GPA, and Unit Converter calculators.
- **Tech**: [Tech Calculators](/calculators/tech) - Binary Converter and Password Generator tools.
- **Utility**: [Utility Calculators](/calculators/utility) - Percentage Calculator.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript.
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS.
- **UI Components**: Shadcn UI.
- **Rendering**: Static site generation (SSG) with optimized route splitting and dynamic client-side hydration.
